Pecan grove in a public park. Maintained by the city, which explicitly welcomes public picking throughout the month of November. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: October-December.
Historic Oak View County Park, 4028 Carya Dr, Raleigh, NC 27610, USA
pecan trees in the fall, you are allowed to pick them for free, the grove is right by the road that’s the entrance to the park Access: Permitted by owner.
Falling Fruit access: Permitted by owner.
